metcon.name: Part B
metcon.description:
3 RFT
10 Synchro Burpees
20  DB Hang Clean & Jerks @22.5/15
30 ab mat sit ups

hypertrophy.reasoning: Address posterior chain imbalances; avoid compounding shoulder/core fatigue from burpees, jerks, and sit-ups.

raw_text:
Partner Workout | 25 min AMRAP
300m Run together
20 Pull-ups  or 10 Bar Muscle-ups
6 wall walks or 20m Handstand Walk
20 DB Snatches
40 KB box overs @ 24/16 - 24/20”
Partition reps as required
One athlete working at a time
Part B | 3 RFT
10 Synchro Burpees
20  DB Hang Clean & Jerks @22.5/15
30 ab mat sit ups
siri_text: Saturday's workout. Metcon: Part B. Rounds for Time: 10 Synchro Burpees, 20  DB Hang Clean & Jerks @22.5/15, 30 ab mat sit ups. For hypertrophy, focus on back (lats), biceps, rear deltoids.
